textByHash.3ad39c4e00047d56e988324c2c77b537412a9b38: THE RED AXE WILL COME FOR YOU!
textByHash.ffaa91e347a18c5dff4f3a9dba942dab87e439be: I don't know... I c-c-c-can't think shtraight when I'm sober.
textByHash.80167b6e02d655dafbd0ff4a47e545c516a451be: DON'T contradict me! Or I won't tell you about ehm... about the... whatever it is you wanted to know.
textByHash.ee4e221ebbca2f08704cb13430f2e2c3bbe64119: I'll shtop, right after you get me shome of the good shtuff!
textByHash.bf4eca14440c026ee79438905b996f9dc08b0350: Did you get me shome of the good stuff yet?
textByHash.192262404150e7f405a2764f0f48ce20e2e96411: What wash that? No no no, this ish noooooo good! I want some of the REALLY good stuff.
textByHash.e7ce4842e4edd8bd3f63c31e49d9dda4b7f04c1d: Some of them original Kelda Stout! Ash blue ash the river! Ash strong ash ole Dondakan's rock. Ash foul tasting ash ash.
textByHash.0af442616c4983e3a7d3eddc1c03da767e6a1799: I know, but get me shome of it anyway. 'ere, have a seed.
textByHash.ae66d00669e2af75b10dd1e641f09da359102ecb: You silly human! Silly shilly silly hman. You need FOUR seeds, and grow them into hops.
textByHash.aa12121320f670eccfa2b53e14b23b6606abccae: Some of me drinking buddies might have 'em. They're quite rare, you shee. Oh yesh, quite rare.
textByHash.cdeecdcd0f9dbd0bfcc624cfcbc13810ad637577: Drinking buddies. Yes, find me some drinking buddies. No, find the other seeds. Yes.
textByHash.a3729279e219d7ff5f2b4e6a68f3341faf9d5a50: You're awfully shmart for a human!
textByHash.d7038dfaf2735a6675faa91235ebb765918dfda5: Jusht pop down to the Laughing Miner and get some, will you?
textByHash.9d7665f66d54568b51fb89cb0005449706036493: It'sh the pub to the... er. North. No, shouth. South.
textByHash.4a2639c9d3318f8e6423c60a5d541c5291b844b1: Well hurry up! I'm dying of thirsht!
textByHash.6577bbd36f634d50bb80928240809ef9def848e4: Now there'sh a good human, gimme that!
textByHash.7d34480ed08de17e1583d55cd33411482402154a: You want to hear about the Red Kebabsh or what? I mean... the Red Axe.
textByHash.ea6a077c93364425ceb75e61765bbb0560a227fc: The Red Axe? You want to know about them, do you? Then let me tell you my tale. It is long and quite unforgettable...
textByHash.d13273e13737e68e0f9899333c15b758fba467ca: A long time ago, quite a while ago, yes... I resigned from my mining company, the Magenta Accordion.
textByHash.013f2060ca08b4fefd3b7ec2ad30355e60b3e658: It is, it is! It's one of the many minor companies, not part of the Consortium.
textByHash.3510334218849f275a26e2f91f74e27f88613d57: Right, so I had just left my company. I'd had enough of slaving away in the mines and decided to become an explorer. Oh yes, like my cousin.
textByHash.c9a9d393f3d59921b1e92b6f95376623949315d0: I explored this old mine, you know, just south of Keldagrim. I think it's boarded up now. Some amazing things I saw there.
textByHash.4a85eaaa56a60d5052d56577587c55b5790f000a: ...and then I nearly fell into the Abyss! But I...
textByHash.9eb26e62a15ca49e40003ddb9bd44df5926c4ee8: ...so I had to run for my life, but then...
textByHash.ef3c10785e101f9813b0dedf3bd88b9c1f7845cc: ...and I don't really remember anything after that. People think I'm a drunken fool.
textByHash.68c06fdb4026d81ab7c1a82f7c4ed42f3ba4e7b4: If you shay sho... I just want to smash up shome shtuff now.
textByHash.6cc330996eb30336fae032a87df43af0d69f49fb: I don't know anyshing about the Red Kebabs.
textByHash.7b7b5f93c057a6d7533b07d128e0e9217d6d7c86: I don't know what you're talking 'bout.
textByHash.2d7a08ef178b22232460c2d284b7300d52297e30: Of courshe! Why why why why shouldn't I be?
textByHash.d502617784dd55857d3c43fb50cc438e7710434e: That'sh not likely... I've been here for eh...
textByHash.8667a252ea031cbd54a39158507ee072798c71c2: I've been looking after thish houshe for my... my coushin? Or wash it my brother? A family member anyway.
textByHash.c28375bbed35ca669783413abea6a55caa772713: All over, all over... he shaish he went off to wander all over Gielinor. Don't remember why.
textByHash.fc967fa8e17bcb7485322962543cdbba7478e79f: He comesh back sometimesh... saysh he needsh more kebabsh.
textByHash.d23da8110289d1f71110fd7a90afc8a092a212ce: Or ish that jusht a dream? Sometimesh I dream kebabsh invade Keldi... Keldu... Keldashomething.
textByHash.1adfd0ba5195087725e75d94d28fc119dcc6fefb: When you eatsh them, they take over your mind, they do! An army of mindlesh kebab eating dwarvesh!
textByHash.7233bdae15482f036f59dc799f7989226ff88361: THE KEBABSH WILL COME FOR YOU!*
textByHash.617dd85223b74da90a64df4b704c3ec0ca6e7d71: THE KEBABSH WILL COME FOR YOU!
textByHash.1e0e737def3bee010dec1ec1c98b9f780a1d8a44: I'm supposhed to sholve this for a bet but I'm feeling a lil eh. Help me!
textByHash.529e2c398f368c6a58af2f9e5fbf48fa8f8da54b: Shorry but you haven't sholved the puzzle yet .
textByHash.72f531169cb05f0af2e4633abdc138a1942ab865: I 'new it were you matey! 'Ere, have some ob the good stuff!
textByHash.bd673f4f4cde3ea41b0d3f84dc85957775f8601d: I 'new it were you matey! I remember your kebab stories! 'Ere, have some ob the good stuff!
textByHash.f4b1bfe6cfb19ad16ee18f753c3310839ba0fb0e: I need to go. 'Ave a good 'un buddy!
textByHash.b94770ae190275666f59840ad314b44541dc6a9a: I fink oiv drunk a bit toooo much.
textByHash.f602ee4a862aafcff03e6f990e4ed922f6ecfdc8: Well, oym goona pass owt now. Have one on me!
textByHash.b0c343f17234a95b4f843d95ea42106dc63b6a39: Aww comeon, talk to ikle me !
textByHash.16df9e751c5a9f0027df5bf55914c9a6e70920cb: Aww, my mate doesn't like me.
